summary: Determining whether a traumatic spinal cord injury is complete or incomplete is clinically significant because it affects prognosis—with higher rates of functional recovery observed in incomplete cases—and supports personalized treatment through validated assessment tools like the ASIA Impairment Scale. \boxed{\text{A}}

Answer choice: A
